sysName: a New CDS genes excluded in NCBI were named HyPMM## sorted by their coordinates on genome;and new CDS genes reported by this study named TibPMM## sorted by their coordinates on genome.

c All CDS genes were classified into the core or flexible genome by Ketter et al. [7].

a Genes of Core and Flexible genome were classified into five expresison subclasses respectively: non expressed genes (NEG), lowly expressed genes (LEG), moderately expressed genes (MEG), highly expressed genes (HEG), and variably expressed genes (VEG)
